evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent v6 API surface: createUploadthing, createRouteHandler, generateUploadButton/Dropzone, UTApi with token, FileRouter type. file.ufsUrl is v6-correct. Claims v6 explicitly.
evidence.executability: Code blocks parse, but playbook recommends ngrok/Cloudflare Tunnel for local callback testing (sandbox-infeasible pattern). Import paths mix ~/app and ~/src/utils which may not resolve without tsconfig. Caps EXECUTABILITY at 2 due to ngrok mention.
evidence.completeness: (a) dashboard URL given; (b) install in bash; (c) env template UPLOADTHING_TOKEN; (d) server core.ts + route.ts; (e) client page + utils; (f) test command present via jest. All six present but no top-level explicit test run script invocation.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official docs.uploadthing.com URLs placed inline next to each relevant code block; matches canonical pattern for UploadThing.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable: applied long-tail handling — playbook is internally consistent and version-claimed (v6), scoring 4 on correctness. Sandbox-infeasibility (ngrok) caps executability at 2.
